data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Bongbong Marcos
19h
Sa oras ng panganib, hindi dapat madagdagan ang hirap ng ating mga kababayan.
Kaya ipinag-utos ko ang agarang pagkilos ng mga ahensya ng pamahalaan upang tumugon sa
ashfall mula sa Mayon Volcano eruption.
Nililinis ang mga kalsada, namamahagi ng N95 masks, at naglalagay ng water stations, mobile
clinics, at tulong para sa mga lumikas upang maprotektahan ang ating mga komunidad.
Patuloy nating binabantayan ang sitwasyon, kabilang ang panganib ng lahar.
...
Alam nating may epekto ito sa kalusugan at kabuhayan ng ating mga kababayan, kaya't tuloy-
tuloy ang tulong ng pamahalaan hanggang makabalik sa normal ang pang-araw-araw na buhay ng
bawat pamilyang apektado.
COURTESY
DOST-PHIVOLCS
May 2, 2026
DOST-PHIV RTVM
PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF
VOLCANOLOGY AND SEISMOLOGY
OneDOST4U: Solutions and Opportunities for All
PRESIDENTIAL BROADCAST
Mayo:02 Valcano 2026-05-02 05:41 PM

```json
  "claims": [
    "Government agencies are responding to ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.",
    "Roads are being cleared, N95 masks distributed, water stations and mobile clinics set up.",
    "Assistance is being provided to evacuees.",
    "The situation is being monitored for lahar risk.",
    "Government assistance will continue until daily life returns to normal."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Multiple sources confirm the Mayon Volcano eruption on May 2, 2026 (Manila Times, Bloomberg)",
    "Government response efforts are underway (Youtube)",
    "Thousands of people were evacuated (Bloomberg)"
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [],
  "fact_correction": null
}
```

data.label: True
data.explanation: Ayy teh, mukhang totoo nga ang chismis! According kay BBM, nag-utos daw siya ng agarang aksyon para sa mga apektado ng Mayon Volcano eruption noong May 2, 2026. May mga balita din na nagpapatunay na nag evacuate ang mga tao at nagbigay ng tulong ang gobyerno.
claims: Government agencies are responding to ashfall from the Mayon Volcano eruption.
Roads are being cleared, N95 masks distributed, water stations and mobile clinics set up.
Assistance is being provided to evacuees.
The situation is being monitored for lahar risk.
Government assistance will continue until daily life returns to normal.
evidence: Multiple sources confirm the Mayon Volcano eruption on May 2, 2026 (Manila Times, Bloomberg)

data.summary: Bongbong Marcos's statement about government actions after the Mayon Volcano eruption is factual, and we can verify this through multiple reliable sources and official reports.
data.tip: Always check if claims made by public figures are supported by multiple, credible news sources or official reports para sure na legit ang info!

literacyLesson.summary: Bongbong Marcos's statement about government actions after the Mayon Volcano eruption is factual, and we can verify this through multiple reliable sources and official reports.

points.issue: BBM mentioned specific actions like cleaning roads, distributing N95 masks, and setting up water stations and mobile clinics.
points.correction: These actions are confirmed by news reports and government updates, showing a coordinated response effort.

points.issue: News outlets like the Manila Times and Bloomberg reported on the Mayon Volcano eruption and the evacuation of thousands.
points.correction: These trusted news sources provide factual reporting, making the claim more credible.

points.issue: The statement mentions monitoring the situation and the risk of lahar.
points.correction: This aligns with ongoing reports from official channels about the volcano's activity and potential hazards.
